name: ADVANCED OXYGEN TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: The company has two subsidiaries: ANV, which leases a single commercial real estate property, and Sharx, which earns commissions from sales of cargo security products. Sharx had no revenue in fiscal 2024 and 2025 due to supply chain issues.

exposures.sentence: Sharx is only selling one type of product and only to the logistics and transportation industry.
Rental Revenue is derived from the Commercial Property lease in which quarterly payments are received pursuant to the property lease which is in effect until 2026.
